title: Ashurbanipal becomes King of Assyria
fact: Ashurbanipal was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 669 BC to his death in 631.

title: Sennacherib becomes King of Assyria
fact: Sennacherib was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 705 BC until his assassination in 681 BC.

title: Ashurnasirpal II becomes King of Assyria
fact: Ashur-nasir-pal II was the third king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 883 to 859 BC.

title: Sargon II becomes King of Assyria
fact: Sargon II was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 722 BC to his death in battle in 705.

title: Tiglath-Pileser III becomes King of Assyria
fact: Tiglath-Pileser III was the Neo-Assyrian emperor from 745 BC to his death in 727.

title: Esarhaddon becomes King of Assyria
fact: Esarhaddon, also spelled Essarhaddon, Assarhaddon and Ashurhaddon was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 681 to 669 BC.

title: Shalmaneser III becomes King of Assyria
fact: Shalmaneser III was king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 859 BC to 824 BC.

title: Shalmaneser V becomes King of Assyria
fact: Shalmaneser V was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 727 BC to his deposition and death in 722 BC.

title: Shamshi-Adad I becomes King of Assyria
Tukulti-Ninurta I becomes King of Assyria
fact: Tukulti-Ninurta I was a king of Assyria during the Middle Assyrian Empire.

title: Tiglath-Pileser I becomes King of Assyria
fact: Tiglath-Pileser I was a king of Assyria during the Middle Assyrian Empire.

title: Shamshi-Adad V becomes King of Assyria
fact: Shamshi-Adad V was the king of the Neo-Assyrian Empire from 824 to 811 BC.

title: Adad-nirari III becomes King of Assyria
fact: Adad-nīrārī III was the King of Assyria from 811 to 783 BC.

title: Tukulti-Ninurta II becomes King of Assyria
fact: Tukulti-Ninurta II was King of Assyria from 890 BCE to 884 BCE.

title: Ashurnasirpal I becomes King of Assyria
fact: Ashurnasirpal I was the king of Assyria, 1049–1031 BC, and the 92nd to appear on the Assyrian Kinglist.
